user_query: My friend is moving to a new city and wants to know the local time and timezone before finalizing the decision. Can you help by providing the timezone information for the city with the IP address 123.45.67.89? Also, suggest some popular places to visit in that city as my friend is an avid traveler.

TaskList.description: Retrieve the timezone information for the city corresponding to the given IP address.
Using the timezone information, determine the local time in that city.
Query popular tourist attractions or places to visit in the city.
